summary: A fourslash test assertion failed: the code fix for adding return type annotations is generating a simpler type suggestion than expected. The test expects 'Add return type 'Foo<string, string[…]'' but the code produces 'Add return type 'Foo<string>''.
root_cause: The fourslash test 'codeFixMissingTypeAnnotationOnExports52-generics-oversimplification.ts' failed at src/harness/fourslashImpl.ts:3435 in verifyCodeFix(). The actual code fix suggestion omits generic type parameters that the test expected.
relevant_tests: fourslash tests / tests/cases/fourslash/codeFixMissingTypeAnnotationOnExports52-generics-oversimplification.ts / fourslash test codeFixMissingTypeAnnotationOnExports52-generics-oversimplification.ts runs correctly

evidence.quote: AssertionError: expected 'Add return type \'Foo<string>\'' to equal 'Add return type \'Foo<string, string[…'
evidence.reason: Explicit assertion error showing the mismatch between expected and actual code fix output
Exact location in code where the assertion failed
Test suite completed with exactly one test failure out of 106366 passing tests

suggested_fix: Update the expected value in tests/cases/fourslash/codeFixMissingTypeAnnotationOnExports52-generics-oversimplification.ts to match the new (simplified) type annotation, or investigate why the code fix is now generating 'Foo<string>' instead of the full generic parameter list.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
